title: Cross-domain architecture and security review with external tool fallback
user_input: Run a joint architecture and security review of the new payment microservice. Use external threat modeling tool if available.

external.name: threat_model_tool.api
external.fallback_action: perform lightweight threat modeling without external tool

gates.rationale: Cross-domain architecture-security review requires expert approval.
External threat modeling tool may process sensitive data. Approval required.

configuration_effort.notes: Requires architecture domain pack with security extension.

concept_questions: should cross-domain review auto-create ADR if gaps found

execution_result.summary: Artifact suite: ThreatModel, SecurityReviewReport, ADRReview, SystemDiagram after expert-gated cross-domain review
